query: I'm writing a design doc for our new auth system and need to find the latest OWASP session management guidelines and any recent CVEs related to JWT token validation — search for those and give me the URLs so I can cite them
We're evaluating Bun vs Deno for our next microservice. Search for recent benchmark comparisons from 2025/2026, community adoption stats, and any blog posts about production usage at scale
I need to find the official ESLint flat config migration guide and any community articles about common pitfalls when migrating from .eslintrc to eslint.config.js
Search for recent news about Anthropic's latest model releases and any developer blog posts about Claude Code features released in the last month
Find sources comparing Turborepo vs Nx for monorepo management — I want articles from 2025+ that cover build caching, CI integration, and developer experience
Look up what happened with the Redis license change and find articles about the community forks like Valkey — I need this for our infrastructure decision doc
I'm preparing a /plan research phase — search for the latest best practices around database connection pooling in serverless environments, particularly with PostgreSQL and Prisma
Find the official documentation URLs for Vitest's workspace feature and any GitHub discussions about known issues with multi-project test configurations

Write a comprehensive 15-page market analysis report on the AI chatbot industry covering market size, growth projections, competitive landscape with SWOT analysis for top 10 players, and strategic recommendations for a startup entering the space

Create a deep research report synthesizing academic papers, industry reports, and government data on the future of edge computing — include full bibliography with DOI links and a trend analysis spanning 2020-2026
Scrape the pricing page at https://vercel.com/pricing and extract all plan names, monthly costs, included features, and usage limits into a structured comparison table
Go to https://docs.bun.sh/cli/test and extract the full API reference for Bun's test runner including all configuration options and CLI flags

Fix the failing unit test in src/utils/parser.test.ts — it's timing out on the async token refresh mock
Refactor the database connection module to use connection pooling and add retry logic with exponential backoff
